children.name: subheadline
children.content: RAG infrastructure for AI coding assistants. Self-hosted with zero cloud deps, or connect to Reka Cloud for managed search and team features.

children.name: tl12
children.content: ✓ Index complete in 4.2s — ready to query

children.name: heading
children.content: Your AI assistant forgets everything. Every. Single. Time.

children.name: body1
children.content: You explain the same architectural decisions every session. Context resets, knowledge resets.

children.name: body2
children.content: Your assistant ignores existing patterns and duplicates utilities already built.

children.name: body3
children.content: Cloud memory means your code flows through third-party servers.

children.name: heading1
children.content: From zero to persistent memory in four steps

children.name: desc1
children.content: One docker-compose up command. Under 60 seconds.

children.name: desc2
children.content: Point your AI assistant via MCP. One JSON config.

children.name: desc3
children.content: Crawls codebase, extracts symbols, builds dependency graph.

children.name: desc4
children.content: Persistent memory. Decisions carry forward across sessions.

children.name: fheading
children.content: Everything your AI assistant needs to understand your codebase

children.name: b1
children.content: Hybrid vector + keyword search. Find code by what it does, not just what it's named.

children.name: b2
children.content: Maps imports and relationships. Trace blast radius of any change.

children.name: b3
children.content: Auto memories enter quarantine. Human-verified become durable knowledge.

children.name: b4
children.content: Instant function, class, and type lookup by name across your entire codebase.

children.name: b5
children.content: 35 tools for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf. Zero configuration overhead.

children.name: b6
children.content: Namespaced collections per project. Share the server, never the data.

children.name: msub
children.content: Reka introduces a governance layer inspired by how human memory actually works.

children.name: bd1
children.content: Every auto-generated memory starts here with a confidence score.

children.name: bd2
children.content: Contradiction detection flags conflicts with existing knowledge.

children.name: bd3
children.content: Canonical knowledge base — decisions, patterns, insights.

children.name: Section Heading
children.content: Transparent by design. No black boxes.

children.name: psub
children.content: One API key per project. No complex configuration.

children.name: c1desc
children.content: Full platform on your infrastructure. Zero cloud dependencies. Your data never leaves your machine.

children.name: c2desc
children.content: Code stays local. Vectors and search in the cloud. One API key per project — no headers, no config.

children.name: c3desc
children.content: Zero infrastructure. Fully managed RAG with team features, SSO, and audit logs. Just plug in your API key.

children.name: qhead
children.content: Up and running in three commands

children.name: c7
children.content: # That's it. Your AI assistant now has memory.

children.name: c14
children.content: # Or connect to Reka Cloud (no infra needed)

children.name: ohead
children.content: Built in the open. Shaped by developers.

children.name: odesc
children.content: Reka's core is source-available under BSL 1.1. Self-host freely, build integrations, contribute back. Converts to Apache 2.0 after 3 years.

children.name: card1b
children.content: Pick up a good-first-issue, improve docs, or add a new parser. Every PR gets a thoughtful review within 48 hours.

children.name: card2b
children.content: Join the conversation on GitHub Discussions. Share your setup, request features, or help other developers.

children.name: card3b
children.content: Star the repo to get release notifications. We ship updates every two weeks with a detailed changelog.

children.name: tagline
children.content: Memory that flows. Knowledge that stays.
